query:
SELECT DATE(createdAt) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(id) AS min_id, MAX(id) AS max_id,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT heroHand ORDER BY heroHand SEPARATOR ', ') AS hands
FROM hands 
WHERE tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL'
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY day;
